performance_overview: Through 12 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has 7 signal-bucketed exit events, 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade) -- this record is unchanged from 06-15 because today (06-16) the book never opened a single position. The evening-scan pipeline gap (data/universe.json has never been built since the 06-15 strategy pivot) left watchlist.json empty all session, so there was nothing to enter, manage, or close -- the EOD review found positions.json == {} and finished with no action needed. Account closed flat at +$0.00/+0.00% while SPY pulled back -0.54% on the day, so alpha was +0.54% today purely by sitting out, not by any new signal edge. Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY -1.0191%, cushion now ~+0.96pts (widened today only because Bull was forced flat on a down day).
overnight_hold_insights: Still ZERO genuine carry-overnight outcomes across all 12 sessions. The overnight_holds.closed_eod bucket remains 7 trades / 3W / 42.9% / avg +0.15%, fully contaminated by intraday/EOD closes (MPC, MPC-leg, CIEN, WDC, TSEM, and SNDK's two exit legs) -- none a real overnight carry. Today added zero new data points: the book was flat all day with no positions ever opened, so there was nothing to evaluate against the 6 safe-hold gates at the bell. Carry policy unchanged: profitable + trailing-stop-active + price>EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion. Standing lesson still applies once trades resume: low-ATR names that don't extend within the session get stopped/scratched before they can ever become carry candidates.
recent_market_context: 2026-06-16 (Tue): VIX calm 16.1, SPY's open-of-day regime read was trending up (EMA9 743.81 > EMA21 742.41) but the index reversed intraday to close -0.54% on the day -- Bull avoided that chop only by being forced flat (no candidates), not by any defensive skill. Prior day 06-15: VIX calm 16.64, SPY rallied +1.73%, Bull's low-ATR names got noise-stopped (TSEM -$54.40) alongside the first genuine signal-driven winner (SNDK +$88.47 round trip), netting only +$34.07/+0.034% (alpha -1.69%). Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY -1.0191%.
notes_for_next_session: EVENING SCAN PIPELINE FIXED as of 06-16 4PM run -- data/universe.json now exists (516 tickers: 503 S&P 500 + 101 NASDAQ-100) and data/watchlist_evening.json has 3 candidates for tomorrow (06-17): MGM, CDNS, ANET (ranked by composite score, see watchlist_evening.json for full fields incl. prev_day_high for the breakout gate). Three bugs fixed during this run, all committed: (a) Wikipedia now requires a User-Agent header, scripts/build_universe.py was updated to send one; (b) the NASDAQ-100 table parser broke on a non-string-column table, made defensive; (c) evening_scan.py was silently dropping an entire 50-symbol batch whenever one invalid ticker (BF-B, BRK-B -- Alpaca rejects the hyphenated share-class format) was in it, since chunks are alphabetical and deterministic this was a recurring ~10% daily data loss, not a one-off; added a drop-invalid-and-retry loop so single bad symbols no longer take out their whole chunk (coverage now 514/516 vs 466/516 before the fix). Candidate quality assessment for premarket: MGM is the strongest (RS 1.30, vol-dry 0.48, both comfortably past their thresholds) but is 7.0% off its 52w high and VCP 0.72 is only borderline-tight, so confirm the breakout isnt chasing an already-extended move. CDNS is mid-tier (RS 1.12 barely clears 1.10, VCP 0.74, vol-dry 0.67 -- reasonable but not standout). ANET is the weakest of the three: RS 1.16, VCP 0.79, and vol-dry 0.87 are all close to their respective cutoffs (1.10 / 0.80 / 0.90), meaning it qualified narrowly rather than convincingly -- weight its breakout-confirmation gate carefully. Market backdrop: SPY closed -0.54% on 06-16 (VIX 16.1, calm) after an intraday reversal from a trending-up open, so all three setups are coiling against a softening tape; require clean breakout confirmation (prior_day_high reclaim or VWAP reclaim per the post-pivot gates) rather than assuming continuation. ACCOUNT STATE carried over from 06-16 EOD: book FLAT, zero open positions, equity $99,938.80, daytrade_count 0, not PDT, not blocked, no kill_switch. ENTRY WINDOW: config.py hard-codes 9:31-10:30 AM ET only (ENTRY_END_HOUR_ET=10, ENTRY_END_MIN_ET=30) -- ignore stale 1:00 PM references in older notes. STILL-OPEN BUGS (unrelated to today, carried over, unfixed): fill-reconciliation defect (stops that self-fill are not always logged -- reconcile broker order history before update_memory); partial-sell does not auto-cancel the protective stop.
